algorithm_comprehension.notes: Tiling visualization (01-fa-tiling.png) and numerical trace (01-online-softmax-trace.png) both present and well-captioned. Variance proof complete with all 5 steps. SRAM quantification table with concrete numbers. Hand-calculable example (3 tokens, d_k=4) traceable on paper.

code_walkthrough.notes: Section 7 provides thorough line-by-line walkthrough of fused_attention_triton.py:L58-L248. Section 3 walks through reference_attention.py:L25-L52. Running output shown for variance analysis and Triton validation. Source Diff table at L680-688 is clear and honest about simplifications.

source_grounding.notes: Lint PASS. 16-row source mapping table (required: 5+). Every section has source references. REFERENCE comments verified on all implementation functions. √d_k propagation chain (L298-L311) is an excellent cross-file source trace.

formula_renderability.notes: Lint ALL PASSED. 0 blocking issues. No \text{}, no \boxed{}, no \tag*{}, all \frac in block display. \mathrm{} used correctly for non-variable text.

coherence.notes: Flow is excellent: 水杯直觉 → 历史脉络 → Problem Demo → QKV图书馆类比 → Math step-by-step → Variance proof → Multi-Head → GQA → FlashAttention → Mask → Backend → Source Map → Verification → Summary. Each section builds naturally on the previous. The historical context (Bahdanau→Luong→Vaswani→Dao) provides motivation for WHY each innovation happened.

issues.detail: Section 7 (FlashAttention) is ~215 lines — the longest and densest section. A brief '此刻你知道了什么' checkpoint between the algorithm explanation (L538) and the kernel code walkthrough (L562) would give readers a moment to absorb before diving into Triton syntax.

readability.notes: The '我把水杯放在桌上，它翻了' intro immediately grounds the concept in daily experience. Library analogy makes QKV concrete. 掷骰子 analogy for variance is intuitive and memorable. Sentences are appropriate length. Technical terms defined on first use.

engagement.notes: Excellent hook — you want to keep reading. Historical context section adds depth without lecture-tone. '一个词是一座孤岛' builds empathy for the problem. Library and dice analogies provide levity at right moments. Consistent 'knowledgeable friend at whiteboard' voice.

cross_chapter_consistency.notes: Forward references to Ch02 (kv_cache_manager.py:106, KVCacheManager.allocate_slots()) are specific and grounded. KV Cache preview in Section 6 correctly calculates sizes. No contradictions with standard attention knowledge.

concept_precision.notes: All technical terms correctly named. GQA table uses specific model names (Llama-3-8B) with correct KV dimensions. '早期 GPT' from v6 review resolved. Simplifications explicitly marked (fixed-length vs variable-length, MHA-only vs GQA kernel, tl.exp vs tl.math.exp2).

what_improved_since_v6: DIAGRAMS: 4 diagrams created (fa-tiling, online-softmax-trace, attention-pipeline, tiled-attention). fa-tiling and softmax-trace already referenced in narrative with excellent captions.
HOOK: Complete rewrite — '水杯翻了' analogy replaces cold '打开 attention.py:L177' open. Immediately accessible to 0-basis readers.
HISTORICAL CONTEXT: New section tracing Bahdanau→Luong→Vaswani→Dao. Explains WHY each innovation happened, not just WHAT.
STRUCTURE: 12 numbered sections with clear progression. Section 5 (Multi-Head) and Section 6 (GQA) are now separate — easier to digest.
FORMULA LINT: 0 blocking issues (improved from 22 density warnings in v5).
GQA TABLE: '早期 GPT' imprecision resolved — now uses specific model names and correct KV dimensions.

suggestions_for_writer.topic: 两个未引用的图表——建议补上引用点位
suggestions_for_writer.detail: diagrams/ 下有 4 组图表，叙事中只引用了 2 组。01-attention-pipeline.png 完美展示了 Q→K^T→÷√d_k→softmax→×V 的五步管线，带具体数字（q₀·k₀=0.8 等）——放在 Section 3（Scaled Dot-Product Attention 推导）作为'看图说话'会非常好。02-tiled-attention.png 展示了三路 Q block 并行遍历 KV block 的全局结构——如果觉得 01-fa-tiling 已经够用可以不引用，但至少知道它存在。建议：Section 3 的数学推导（L175 matrix form 前后）加 attention-pipeline 图引用。

suggestions_for_writer.topic: Section 7 密度——加一个喘息点
suggestions_for_writer.detail: Section 7 从 L475 到 L688（~215 行），从朴素 attention 的 HBM 问题一路冲到 SRAM 用量分析。中间几乎没有停顿。建议在 L538（online softmax 算法伪代码结束）和 L562（kernel 源码走读开始）之间插入一小段：'此刻你知道了什么：FlashAttention 用三层循环（Q block 外层 × KV block 内层 × 每个 block 内的 online softmax）把 O(L²) 的 HBM 读写降到 O(L)。三个 accumulator（m, l, O_acc）在 SRAM 里维护 running state。接下来看 Triton 怎么把这套逻辑变成 GPU 指令。' 大约 3-4 行，给读者一个深呼吸。

suggestions_for_writer.topic: '历史脉络' 编号风格不一致
suggestions_for_writer.detail: 目前结构是：hook → 历史脉络（无编号）→ 1. 先看问题 → 2. Q,K,V → ... → 12. 总结。历史脉络作为'阅读前背景'可以不编号，但也可以考虑给一个编号如'0. 历史脉络'或标注为'[阅读前背景]'以消除风格不一致感。不强制——纯审美选择。
